name: Data Ingestion & Transformation
description: Kinesis Data Streams/Firehose, MSK, Glue ETL, EMR, Lambda, and AppFlow for moving and reshaping data.

name: Data Store Management
description: S3 storage classes and lifecycle, Redshift design and workload management, DynamoDB, RDS/Aurora, and data cataloging.

name: Data Operations & Support
description: Orchestration with Step Functions/MWAA/EventBridge, monitoring with CloudWatch, and incident response for pipelines.

name: Data Security & Governance
description: IAM, KMS, Lake Formation fine-grained access, encryption in transit and at rest, PII handling, and audit.
